variants.name: 碎煤机
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择除你以外的一名玩家：如果他明天白天提名了另一名玩家，那名玩家会在黄昏死亡。
variants.firstNightReminder: remove the "Empowered" reminder token. The Coalcrusher chooses a player who isn't themself -- Mark this player with the "Empowered" reminder token.
variants.otherNightReminder: remove the "Empowered" reminder token. The Coalcrusher chooses a player who isn't themself -- Mark this player with the "Empowered" reminder token.
variants.flavor: I'VE BEEN IN THE BLOODY MINES FOR 48 HOURS TODAY
